rationale: The current best run leaves about 3.16MB of compressed headroom under the 16MB cap, so this change spends some of that budget on the tensors most likely to dominate post-quantization error: the final decoder block is kept in FP16 and the last two blocks keep their output projections in FP16. That directly targets `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb` without slowing the hot training loop, while keeping the existing late quant-aware roundtrip schedule intact.
title: Late-Decoder FP16 Quantization Rescue
